title: List of changes for version 1.3 of the Mid-Tier Contract
body: "The Mid-Tier Contract was updated in February 2025 to version 1.3. These documents outline what has changed. The list of changes sets out the changes at a high level. The comparison / mark-up document shows a comparison of version 1.2 and 1.3. Schedules which have no substantive changes (e.g. just formatting, version and year changes) are not included in the comparison / mark-up document. "
